---
title: "Citation"
---

If you use CodeBook Lab or CodeBook Studio in research, please cite the relevant software. If you use the full validation workflow, cite both tools. The associated preprint can be cited for the methodological framework and validation-first approach.

## CodeBook Lab

APSR style:

McLaren, Lorcan. 2026. *CodeBook Lab* (Version v{{< var version >}}) [Computer software]. Zenodo. <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19185921>.

BibTeX:

```bibtex
@software{mclaren_codebook_lab_2026,
  author = {McLaren, Lorcan},
  title = {CodeBook Lab},
  year = {2026},
  version = {v{{< var version >}}},
  doi = {10.5281/zenodo.19185921},
  url = {https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19185921}
}
```

## CodeBook Studio

APSR style:

McLaren, Lorcan. 2026. *CodeBook Studio* (Version v1.2.1) [Computer software]. Zenodo. <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19185938>.

BibTeX:

```bibtex
@software{mclaren_codebook_studio_2026,
  author = {McLaren, Lorcan},
  title = {CodeBook Studio},
  year = {2026},
  version = {v1.2.1},
  doi = {10.5281/zenodo.19185938},
  url = {https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19185938}
}
```

## Preprint

APSR style:

McLaren, Lorcan, James P. Cross, Zuzanna Krakowska, Robin Rauner, and Martijn Schoonvelde. 2026. *Magic Words or Methodical Work? Challenging Conventional Wisdom in LLM-Based Political Text Annotation*. arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.26898. <https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26898>.

BibTeX:

```bibtex
@misc{mclaren_magic_words_2026,
  author = {McLaren, Lorcan and Cross, James P. and Krakowska, Zuzanna and Rauner, Robin and Schoonvelde, Martijn},
  title = {Magic Words or Methodical Work? Challenging Conventional Wisdom in LLM-Based Political Text Annotation},
  year = {2026},
  eprint = {2603.26898},
  archivePrefix = {arXiv},
  primaryClass = {cs.CL},
  doi = {10.48550/arXiv.2603.26898},
  url = {https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26898}
}
```

## License

CodeBook Lab and CodeBook Studio are released under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0. You are free to use, modify, and distribute them — including over a network — provided derivative works remain under the same terms.

- [CodeBook Lab license](https://github.com/LorcanMcLaren/codebook-lab/blob/main/LICENSE)
- [CodeBook Studio license](https://github.com/LorcanMcLaren/codebook-studio/blob/main/LICENSE)
